verses.1: A Song of degrees. When the LORD turned again the captivity of Zion, we were like them that dream.
verses.2: Then was our mouth filled with laughter, and our tongue with singing: then said they among the heathen, The LORD hath done great things for them.
verses.3: The LORD hath done great things for us; of which we are glad.
verses.4: Turn again our captivity, O LORD, as the streams in the south.
verses.5: They that sow in tears shall reap in joy.
verses.6: He that goeth forth and weepeth, bearing precious seed, shall doubtless return with rejoicing, bringing his sheaves with him .

metadata.source: Webster's Bible (1833) — presented as-is with minor editorial corrections for the ABIDE Bible App.
